title: Hardys Connector Manifest Schema
description: Schema for connector-manifest.json — published as OCI annotation on the connector image. Read by Hardys Core without starting the container.

manifest_version.description: Version of the manifest format itself

connector_class.description: Connector class. Currently only 'lecture' is defined.

version.description: Semantic version of the connector implementation

display_name.description: Human-readable name shown in Core admin UI

capabilities.description: Capability strings declared by this connector. Used by Core to route data streams.

readonly_fields.description: Fields that are fixed and cannot be edited by admin. Shown for reference only.

instance_fields.description: Fields configured by admin at connector registration time. Saved in Cosmos DB. Passed in ConnectRequest.credentials or ConnectRequest.params.

runtime_fields.description: Fields populated by Core at lecture time (not known at config time). Passed in ConnectRequest lecture runtime fields. Core uses these to render the lecture launch UI. May also be retrieved dynamically via GetLectureConfigSchema().

debug_fields.description: Debug and observability fields. Shown in a separate Debug section in Core admin UI.

name.description: Field key — maps to ConnectRequest field name or credentials/params key

type.description: Field type. 'secret' fields are masked in UI and encrypted in Cosmos DB

label.description: Human-readable label shown in Core admin UI

description.description: Help text shown in Core admin UI

required.description: If true, Connect() MUST reject the call if this field is missing or empty

editable.description: If false, field is shown but cannot be edited (instance_fields only)

default.description: Default value used if field is not provided

example.description: Example value shown as placeholder in UI
